positive: A whimsical and stylish maximalist arrangement of celestial and floral elements. Center focus features a vibrant crescent moon surrounded by stylized constellations of glowing geometric stars, intertwined with delicate, overgrown watercolor roses, ferns, and grapevines. The composition should utilize a high-contrast, dark-sky aesthetic with jewel-toned pops of color (deep sapphire blue, emerald green, magenta, and gold leaf accents). The style is a blend of Art Nouveau etching and modern tattoo flash art, highly detailed and illustrative. Clean, bold silhouettes are paramount. Ideal for a repeatable, scalable apparel print. High contrast, symmetrical balance, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, 8k.
negative: blurry, lowres, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, out of focus, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, dirty, faded, realistic photo
